mapper.select: select pause_id, tenant_id, menu_id, pause_status, pause_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from scm_tenant_menu_pause where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and menu_id = #{menuId}

select pause_id, tenant_id, menu_id, pause_status, pause_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from scm_tenant_menu_pause where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by create_time desc
select menu_id from scm_tenant_menu_pause where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and pause_status = '1'
mapper.insert: insert into scm_tenant_menu_pause (pause_id, tenant_id, menu_id, pause_status, pause_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{pauseId}, #{tenantId}, #{menuId}, #{pauseStatus}, #{pauseTime}, #{createBy}, now(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update scm_tenant_menu_pause set pause_status = #{pauseStatus}, pause_time = #{pauseTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now(), remark = #{remark} where pause_id = #{pauseId}
